description:
The UnwrappableBoxDriver component makes a 6 sided cube made of individual quads that unwrap themselves into a flat area like a paper box. 

A box is auto generated upon attaching the component and fields are auto filled.

This can be used for presents or crates.

fields.SideSize: The size of each side (a default Quad is 1)
fields.ScaleContent: Whether to scale the side slots and align them to fit as ``SideSize``'s value increases.
fields._side0rotation: The rotation field of side 0 of the box.
fields._side1rotation: The rotation field of side 1 of the box.
fields._side2rotation: The rotation field of side 2 of the box.
fields._side3rotation: The rotation field of side 3 of the box.
fields._topRotation: The rotation field of the top side of the box.
fields._side0offset: The position field of side 0 of the box.
fields._side1offset: The position field of side 1 of the box.
fields._side2offset: The position field of side 2 of the box.
fields._side3offset: The position field of side 3 of the box.
fields._topOffset: The position field of the top side of the box.
fields._side0contentOffset: The position field of the content of side 0 of the box.
fields._side1contentOffset: The position field of the content of side 1 of the box.
fields._side2contentOffset: The position field of the content of side 2 of the box.
fields._side3contentOffset: The position field of the content of side 3 of the box.
fields._topContentOffset: The position field of the content of the top side of the box.
fields._side0contentScale: The scale field of the content of side 0 of the box.
fields._side1contentScale: The scale field of the content of side 1 of the box.
fields._side2contentScale: The scale field of the content of side 2 of the box.
fields._side3contentScale: The scale field of the content of side 3 of the box.
fields._bottomContentScale: The scale field of the content of the bottom side of the box.
fields._topContentScale: The scale field of the content of the top side of the box.

usage: Attach to a slot and a box will automatically be generated and setup. The sides can be customized to the user's liking and the ``Unwrap`` field adjusted or hooked into a driver.
